title: Darwin IV mod
description: Explore an alien planet Darwin IV from an iconic book The Expedition by Wayne Douglas Barlowe.
body:
![title image.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab50bb51b6848faf082b178da0c38de400357214.png)

Explore an alien planet Darwin IV from an iconic book The Expedition by Wayne Douglas Barlowe.  This mod adds a unique alien planet dimension with unique creatures and loot. Get ready to delve into a challenging and intriquing new world.

This mod is currently unfinished! So only a half-baked beta is аvailable.

Mod adds a new dimension, to which you can travel through a special portal that can be rarely found in the overworld. It can be activated by using a Yuma Technology item that you can craft by using a netherstar, 3 iron ignots and a redstone block.

New dimension called Darwin IV, contains 6 new unique biomes and 16 new mobs and 3 inuque soundtracks composed by PesterJest and Heath!

current biomes are:
- Amoebic sea
- Deep Amoebic sea
- Pocket forest
- Saline valley
- Prairie 
- Litoral zone

list of mobs:
1. Emperor sea strider
2. Sea strider nymph
3. Disk flyer
4. Dark disk flyer
5. Stripewing 
6. Amoebite
7. Amoebound
8. Prairie ram
9. Jetdarter
10. Skewer
11. Symbiont flyer
12. Sackback
13. Beach quill
14. Spinosa
15. Shorehopper
16. Pillslug
    
All of the mobs are well animated and modeled with unique drops.

The mod adds a variety of life quality enhancing blocks and items.

please consider that this mod is still in early development, so not all content is added or polished! 
critiques and help will be more than welcome!
